    Method
    Description
    void
    GLFWInputSystem.attachToWindow(GLFWWindow window)
    Attaches this input system to a window.
    static GLFWContext.MainLoop
    GLFWContext.createLoop(GLFWWindow window, GLFWInputSystem inputSystem)
    Creates a mechanism for looping on polling a GLFWWindow and InputSystem.

    Detaches this input system from a window.

    Makes a window the current target of OpenGL/GLES calls for this thread.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    GLFWWindow(GLFWWindowHints hints, GLFWMonitor monitor, GLFWWindow sharedWindow, String title, int width, int height)
    Creates a new GLFW window, sharing its OpenGL resources with another window.

    Creates a new GLFW window, sharing its OpenGL resources with another window.
